# Reviewer Authority Plan

This planning note documents future reviewer authority concepts only.

## Authority Concepts

- Reviewers may approve planning documentation when in scope.
- Reviewers may block unsafe changes.
- Reviewers may require escalation when evidence is unclear.
- Reviewers may not approve runtime communication in planning phases.
- Reviewers may not approve provider implementation in planning phases.

## Lineage Concepts

Future review evidence may include reviewer role, timestamp, scope, escalation path, and approval lineage.

## Non-Execution Statement

This file does not create GitHub permissions, workflows, branch rules, deployment automation, or runtime authority.
